name: sabuj-menar-travel-agency-root
description: Root configuration for Sabuj Menar Travel Agency web app

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend

author: Antigravity
